sentences.target: J'ai une miette sur la lèvre.

translations.fr: J'ai une miette sur la lèvre.
translations.en: I have a crumb on my lip.
translations.es: Tengo una migaja en el labio.
translations.de: Ich habe einen Krümel an der Lippe.
translations.zh-Hans: 我嘴唇上有一粒面包屑。
translations.vi: Tôi có một vụn bánh trên môi.
translations.nl: Ik heb een kruimel op mijn lip.
translations.hi: मेरे होंठ पर ब्रेड का चूरा है.
translations.el: Έχω ένα ψίχουλο στο χείλος μου.
translations.nb: Jeg har en brødsmule på leppen.
translations.sv: Jag har en smula på läppen.
translations.da: Jeg har en krumme på læben.
translations.ja: 唇にパンくずがついている。

tokens.explanation: Subject clitic pronoun 'je' elided before a vowel sound; 1st person singular.
Main lexical verb 'avoir', present indicative 1st person singular, meaning 'to have'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'miette' as a countable item.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing the locative phrase 'sur la lèvre'.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking 'lèvre' as specific.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Je n'en laisse pas une miette.

translations.fr: Je n'en laisse pas une miette.
translations.en: I don't leave a single crumb.
translations.zh-Hans: 我连一粒面包屑都不留。
translations.yue: 我連一粒麵包屑都唔留。
translations.vi: Tôi không để lại một vụn nào.
translations.hi: मैं एक भी कण नहीं छोड़ता हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg lar ikke igjen en eneste smule.
translations.id: Saya tidak menyisakan remah sedikit pun.
translations.sv: Jag lämnar inte en endaste smula.
translations.ro: Nu las nici măcar o firimitură.
translations.da: Jeg efterlader ikke en eneste krumme.
translations.ja: ひとかけらも残さない。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular.
First part of the discontinuous negation 'ne ... pas'; elided before vowel-initial 'en'.
Clitic pronoun replacing a complement introduced by 'de'; object of 'laisse'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; governs the clitic 'en' and the object expression.
Adverb completing the negation 'ne ... pas'; here combines with 'une miette' to mean 'not a single crumb'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'miette' within the negative quantifier.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object in the expression 'pas une miette'.

sentences.target: Il reste une miette sur la table.
sentences.reading: /il ʁɛst yn mjɛt syʁ la tabl/

translations.fr: Il reste une miette sur la table.
translations.ipa: /il ʁɛst yn mjɛt syʁ la tabl/
translations.en: There's a crumb left on the table.
translations.es: Queda una migaja en la mesa.
translations.de: Auf dem Tisch liegt noch ein Krümel.
translations.it: Sul tavolo è rimasta una briciola.
translations.zh-Hans: 桌子上还剩下一粒面包屑。
translations.vi: Trên bàn còn lại một vụn bánh.
translations.nl: Er ligt nog een kruimel op tafel.
translations.hi: मेज़ पर एक कण बचा है.
translations.el: Έμεινε ένα ψίχουλο πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.nb: Det ligger igjen en smule på bordet.
translations.id: Masih ada remah di atas meja.
translations.sv: Det ligger en smula kvar på bordet.
translations.ro: A rămas o firimitură pe masă.
translations.da: Der ligger en krumme tilbage på bordet.
translations.ja: テーブルの上にパンくずがひとつ残っている。

tokens.explanation: Expletive subject pronoun in the impersonal construction 'Il reste ...' meaning 'there remains'.
Intransitive verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; the logical subject is 'une miette'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing 'miette' as the notional subject.
Common noun, feminine singular; notional subject of 'reste'.
Preposition introducing a locative phrase.
Definite article, feminine singular, marking 'table' as specific.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Vous pouvez enlever cette miette du canapé.
sentences.reading: /vu puvɛ ɑ̃lve sɛt mjɛt dy kanape/

translations.fr: Vous pouvez enlever cette miette du canapé.
translations.ipa: /vu puvɛ ɑ̃lve sɛt mjɛt dy kanape/
translations.en: You can remove that crumb from the couch.
translations.es: Puedes quitar esa migaja del sofá.
translations.de: Du kannst den Krümel vom Sofa entfernen.
translations.it: Puoi togliere quella briciola dal divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以把那粒面包屑从沙发上拿掉。
translations.yue: 你可以喺梳化度攞走嗰粒麵包屑。
translations.ru: Можешь убрать эту крошку с дивана.
translations.pt: Você pode tirar aquela migalha do sofá.
translations.he: אפשר להסיר את הפירור הזה מהספה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể lấy vụn bánh đó khỏi ghế sofa.
translations.ar: يمكنك إزالة ذلك الفتات من الأريكة.
translations.nl: Je kunt die kruimel van de bank verwijderen.
translations.uk: Ти можеш прибрати ту крихту з дивана.
translations.hu: Eltávolíthatod azt a morzsát a kanapéról.
translations.hi: आप उस टुकड़े को सोफ़े से हटा सकते हैं.
translations.pl: Możesz usunąć ten okruszek z kanapy.
translations.el: Μπορείς να βγάλεις αυτό το ψίχουλο από τον καναπέ.
translations.nb: Du kan fjerne den smulen fra sofaen.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mengambil remah itu dari sofa.
translations.sv: Du kan ta bort den där smulan från soffan.
translations.ro: Poți să îndepărtezi firimitura aceea de pe canapea.
translations.cs: Můžeš odstranit ten drobek z gauče.
translations.da: Du kan fjerne den krumme fra sofaen.
translations.ja: そのパンくずをソファから取り除けます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person plural or formal singular.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative 2nd person plural; marks ability/permission and selects an infinitive.
Infinitive verb complement of 'pouvez'; denotes the action to perform.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'miette'.
Common noun, feminine singular; direct object of 'enlever'.
Prepositional contraction of 'de + le'; introduces the source phrase 'du canapé' ('from the couch').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'de' within 'du'.
